title: [phase:critique] [family:sidecar-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review remaining-task implementation only: auth/rate-limit/client UX + scripts/smoke-happy-login.js and scripts/smoke-happy-api.js. Return prioritized real findings with file refs; if none, state no findings plus residual risks.
summary_text: 1. **P1: Expected smoke entrypoints are missing (verification gap).** The review target includes `scripts/smoke-happy-login.js` and `scripts/smoke-happy-api.js`, but neither file exists in the repo, so the intended login/API happy-path smoke validation cannot run. Ref: [scripts/](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts) 2. **P1: Rate-limit responses (HTTP 429) are not handled as rate-limit, and polling continues unchanged.** Endpoint errors only classify `401` and `503`; `429` falls into generic `request_error`, so UX shows generic stale state instead of rate-limit state. Poll loops continue at fixed 15s/5s cadence, which can prolong throttling during backend rate-limit periods. Refs: [happy-endpoint-client.js:26](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js#L26), [happy-endpoint-client.js:92](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js#L92), [happy-app-state.js:56](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js#L56), [app.js:9](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L9), [app.js:1059](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L1059), [app.js:1063](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L1063) 3. **P2: “Live session disabled” configuration is effectively bypassed by default URL fallback.** `liveSessionOpenUrl` defaults to `"/cockpit"`, and `enabled` is computed as `liveSessionEnabled || liveSessionOpenUrl`; this makes live mode effectively always enabled and can force navigation to `/cockpit` even when operators intended live mode off. Refs: [happy-runtime-config.js:45](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/config/happy-runtime-config.js#L45), [app.js:234](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L234), [app.js:883](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L883) 4. **Process violation (workflow): this review is single-lane, below required quorum policy.** AGENTS policy sets a 6-lane minimum consensus floor; single-lane fallback should be treated as non-compliant for final confidence gating. Ref: [AGENTS.md:91](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/AGENTS.md#L91) Residual test gap tied to findings: current endpoint client tests cover refresh-on-401 and 503 classification, but not 429/rate-limit behavior or live-disabled routing behavior. Ref: [test-endpoint-client.js:21](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js#L21)
